tagline.name: tagline
tagline.default: 'Helping those in need since 1918. A 100% volunteer-run organization.'

hero_title.name: hero_title
hero_title.default: 'What is the Goodfellows of Lee County?'

hero_subtitle.name: hero_subtitle
hero_subtitle.default: 'We are an organization that has been around 108 years helping those who need a helping hand. Our main giveaway is during the holiday season, but we assist people all year.'

programs_section_subtitle.name: programs_section_subtitle
programs_section_subtitle.default: 'Throughout the year, the Goodfellows of Lee County supports various initiatives to help those in need.'

why_we_care_content.name: why_we_care_content
why_we_care_content.default:
'One thing we''re taught at a young age is to treat others as you want to be treated. The Goodfellows of Lee County don''t just follow this rule, they live it.

Every year our volunteer board of directors along with community members work to make sure every child in Lee County is treated the same — that they too, regardless of income, can have their own gift during the holiday season.'

why_we_care_highlight.name: why_we_care_highlight
why_we_care_highlight.default: 'Whether you donate $2 or $1,000, every bit helps.'

board_section_subtitle.name: board_section_subtitle
board_section_subtitle.default: 'Led by dedicated volunteers who give their time to make a difference.'

apply_hero_subtitle.name: apply_hero_subtitle
apply_hero_subtitle.default: 'If you''re a Lee County resident in need of assistance, we''re here to help. Applications for holiday assistance are accepted from September 1 through October 31.'

apply_pdf_text.name: apply_pdf_text
apply_pdf_text.default: 'Download a PDF application and mail it in or drop it off at our office.'

contact_hero_subtitle.name: contact_hero_subtitle
contact_hero_subtitle.default: 'Have questions about our programs, want to volunteer, or need assistance? We''d love to hear from you.'

contact_about_text.name: contact_about_text
contact_about_text.default: 'Goodfellows of Lee County is an all-volunteer organization. As we don''t have regular office hours, email is the best way to reach us. We typically respond within 1-2 business days.'
